task_completion.description: Access the SeisComP MySQL database or SCML inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a connection to the MySQL database (e.g., 'mysql -u sysop -p seiscomp') or commands viewing SCML inventory files.

task_completion.description: Retrieve the epicenter and station coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL queries or text parsing commands extracting the origin coordinates of the Noto earthquake and the coordinates of the 5 GE stations (TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB).

task_completion.description: Compute the current and proposed azimuthal gaps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script (e.g., Python) or mathematical tool being written or executed to calculate the azimuths and gaps for the current 5 stations and the proposed 6 stations.

task_completion.description: Generate the JSON report file at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing the creation or saving of a file named 'azimuthal_gap_report.json' in the '/home/ga/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON report follows the required schema.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the JSON report are visible and include the keys 'epicenter' (with 'latitude' and 'longitude'), 'current_stations' (value 5), 'current_gap_degrees', 'proposed_gap_degrees', and 'improvement_degrees'.

integrity.description: Agent must extract coordinates from the database or inventory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent querying or reading the actual coordinates from the system, not just hardcoding them from external knowledge.

integrity.description: Agent must compute the gaps programmatically or mathematically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a script or tool performing the azimuthal gap calculations, rather than the agent hallucinating or fabricating the final numbers.

integrity.description: Agent must only use the specified stations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The calculation script or queries should only include the 5 existing stations (TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB) and the 1 proposed station (GE.TK01).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected JSON report path is exactly '/home/ga/azimuthal_gap_report.json'. The proposed station GE.TK01 coordinates must be latitude 35.689 and longitude 139.692.
